visualizerParams.title: Clean Polygon Check with `max()`
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided polygon check sorts the entire list of sides to find the largest. Refactor it to use the `max()` function and total `sum()` for a more efficient and direct implementation that avoids O(n log n) sorting.

solution.explanation: Using `max()` and `sum()` reduces the time complexity from O(n log n) to O(n). Mathematically, the condition `max_side < sum(others)` is equivalent to `max_side < (total_sum - max_side)`, which is cleaner and faster to compute.
